---
name: Security fix
about: Track a defensive security fix or hardening task
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## Scope

Link the authorized repository, issue, or security program rule that permits this work.

## Summary

Describe the defensive issue or hardening opportunity without exposing sensitive exploit details.

## Proposed Fix

Explain the intended code or documentation change.

## Validation

List tests, checks, or review steps used to confirm the fix.

## Disclosure Notes

State whether any details should remain private until maintainers approve disclosure.
